titleStmt.title: SII 4.1020: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1020. (A.R. No. 194 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti
kāmāṁbākamanīya
mivako¨rttiyaḥ . śākābdē vyōmavēdāṁbaraśaśigaṇitē nūkanā¨ryyassadhīmānvṛddhyai puṇyasya pitrō rudagayana
caṁdratāraṁ . dākṣārāmēśvarāya tribhuvanaguravē bhīmanādhāya bhaktyā . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1040 nēṇṭi svasti samastabhuvanāśra
ramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara paṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa
rājakēsariva¨rmma pe¨rmmanaḍigalu gaṁgākāvēri pa[¨r]yyaṁtaṁ saptamo viṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁgacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamāna vijayarā
jyadivya saṁvatsara 9 yagu śrahi dinamulu 350 gaṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭi guddavādināṁṭi peddaḍakarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku nuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁttini
mittamuna nelupūṇḍi bhīmarājukoḍuku nūṁkaya peṭṭina yakhaṇḍava¨rttilōhadaṇḍu diviya Okaṇḍu dīnika nācaṁdra¨rkkamu neyi sariyiccuvārugā śrībhīmēśvara
mahādēvara kilaramuna navabhōla prōlayayu kāṭabōla paṇḍayayu Eṟiyabōla bādayayu talarāsi nāvayu berasina bōlu nalvuruṁ būṁṭagā neṟiyabō
la bādani yaḍapuna kannabōla nūṁkani vasamuna viḍcina InupaEḍlu Ēṁbhadi 50 nityapaḍi vanāṁkuśamuna nē mā 1 likhataṁ ḍākarēmi
Digital edition of SII 4.1020 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
